hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); pl=p.lower(); mp={'commuter':['commuter','search','check','vehicle','booking'],'parking-partner':['partner','onboard','capacity','schedul','lot'],'parking-staff':['staff','attendant'],'core':['session','qr','data-model','model','fallback'],'integrations':['payment','maps','metro','ticket','busmap'],'admin':['admin','dashboard','government']}; m=[f\"docs/knowledgebase/{mod}/\" for mod,kw in mp.items() if any(k in pl for k in kw)]; m=m if m else ['docs/knowledgebase/ (check all modules)']; print(json.dumps({'systemMessage':'KB update? '+os.path.basename(p)+' -> '+', '.join(m)}))" 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"systemMessage": "ParkHub reminder: If any new product decisions were made this session (flows, features, scope, data model), update CLAUDE.md and the memory files at ~/.claude/projects/-home-fionn-Documents-Dev-parking-slot/memory/"}'

python3 -c "import json; f=open('/home/fionn/Documents/Dev/parking_slot/CLAUDE.md'); c=f.read(); f.close(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'SessionStart','additionalContext':'[ParkHub Project Loaded]\n'+c[:4000]}}))" 2>/dev/null || true
